role_summary: Joint oral history at the Library of Congress; this catalog page treats the combined transcript as a single embedding signature.
ai_reading: Carolyn Miller and James Miller's top semantic neighbor is Charles McLaurin (entry 17, count 128); the broader cluster includes Nathaniel Hawthorne Jones (#92), Walter Bruce (#123), Vernon Dahmer, Jr. (#121).
biographical_paragraph: This joint oral history is held at the Library of Congress as entry 12 of the Civil Rights History Project (American Folklife Center accession AFC 2010/039) [src: 1]. The LoC transcript carries a not-auditable audit tier: the catalog cannot independently certify the transcript against primary sources for this entry, and any specific biographical or quoted claims should be confirmed against external archives before citation. Independent biographical sourcing for an extended orientation paragraph is pending; the strongest signal currently available is the embedding pattern named in the AI's reading above.
